headline: Jim Cramer on Thermo Fisher: “I Think That the Market Has This Wrong”
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Noting the market’s reaction to the company’s recently reported quarter, Cramer said: Alright, what just happened to the stock of Thermo Fisher Scientific, the arms dealer to the life sciences industry that […]
